original_image_tags: A faded, pink-colored index card or routing slip, horizontally oriented. It has two hole-punch marks at the top center. The text is faint and appears to be typed or stamped in purple or faded ink. A prominent vertical stamp is on the left side, and the main text is a telex routing slip. The paper shows age and wear.

elements.description: A faint, pinkish-beige paper back showing two black hole-punch marks at the top. A typed label at the top center reads 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT' followed by a date stamp 'AUG 14 9 29 PM '47'. On the left side, there is an arched blue ink stamp that reads 'RECEIVED 9 31 AM 15 AUG 1947 INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I.' Faint, mirrored reverse text is visible through the paper.

judge.reason: One side quotes specific verbatim text ('RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT', 'RECEIVED 9 31 AM 15 AUG 1947 INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I.') while the other does not, and the descriptions are contradictory regarding the presence and content of typed/stamped text versus a telex routing slip.
